source_gate.finding: Official dated EIA Natural Gas Weekly Update archive pages previously recovered release dates, total storage levels, and weekly net changes; source/vintage gate remains passed.

market_data_gate.reason: This scheduled runtime did not expose usable Alpaca authentication. Alpaca-py refused an unauthenticated StockHistoricalDataClient request, so no qfa/Alpaca ETF bars could be retrieved.

candidate_universe_policy.selection_basis: Would select non-levered/non-inverse natural-gas, energy, pipeline/MLP, utility, commodity, and risk-control ETFs by Alpaca daily-bar availability, history, liquidity, and economic exposure; no return optimization.
candidate_universe_policy.limitation: Selection could not be finalized without real Alpaca daily bars and data-availability checks. Natural-gas ETF/ETN history and closures may force broader energy-sector/oil/gas proxies.

decision_rationale: Hold rather than reject: source/vintage gate passed, but the mandated qfa/Alpaca real ETF performance evaluation was impossible in this runtime without credentials. No CSV-backed market data, daemon, orders, raw bars, raw arrays, or equity paths were used or retained.
compact_artifact_note: No raw market data, raw daily paths, equity curves, databases, caches, helper scripts, credentials, credential variable names, or command snippets retained.
